sketchBlocks.title: What are default values in SQL?
sketchBlocks.bodyMarkdown:
A default value in SQL is a preset value that a column will use if no value is provided during an INSERT. For example, in the `inventory_items` table, the `status` column has a default of `'draft'`, and `is_test` defaults to `0`. If you insert a row without specifying these columns, the database will automatically use their default values.

Example:
```sql
INSERT INTO inventory_items (name, category, price) VALUES ('Keychain', 'Accessories', 3.50);
```
This will insert a new row with `status` set to `'draft'`, `is_test` set to `0`, and `last_updated` set to `'2026-02-01'` (the default).

sketchBlocks.title: How do NULL and defaults interact?
sketchBlocks.bodyMarkdown:
If a column allows NULL and has no default, omitting it in an INSERT will set it to NULL. If a column has a default and you omit it, the default is used. If you explicitly insert `NULL` into a column that allows NULL, the value will be NULL, even if a default exists.

Example:
```sql
INSERT INTO inventory_items (name, category, price, notes) VALUES ('Sample Pen', 'Accessories', 1.99, NULL);
```
Here, `notes` will be NULL, while columns like `status` and `is_test` will use their defaults.

quizDraft.title: Insert with omitted default columns
quizDraft.prompt: Insert a new inventory item named 'Desk Mat' in the 'Accessories' category with a price of 12.99. Do not specify the status, is_test, or last_updated columns. Write the SQL statement.
quizDraft.hint: Only provide values for name, category, and price. The other columns will use their defaults.

help.concept: When you omit columns with defaults in an INSERT, SQL fills them in automatically.
help.hint_1: List only the columns you want to set. The rest will use their default values.
help.hint_2: Your INSERT should mention name, category, and price only.

quizDraft.solutionCode: INSERT INTO inventory_items (name, category, price) VALUES ('Desk Mat', 'Accessories', 12.99);

quizDraft.title: Explicitly inserting NULL
quizDraft.prompt: Insert a new inventory item named 'Sample Cup' in the 'Kitchen' category with a price of 5.00. Set the notes column to NULL explicitly. Do not specify status, is_test, or last_updated. Write the SQL statement.
quizDraft.hint: Include the notes column in your column list and set its value to NULL.

help.concept: You can explicitly insert NULL into nullable columns, even if they have no default.
help.hint_1: Add notes to your column list and use NULL as its value.
help.hint_2: Your INSERT should set notes to NULL and omit columns with defaults.

quizDraft.solutionCode: INSERT INTO inventory_items (name, category, price, notes) VALUES ('Sample Cup', 'Kitchen', 5.00, NULL);

quizDraft.title: Insert using all defaults except required columns
quizDraft.prompt: Insert a new inventory item named 'Test Poster' in the 'Decor' category with a price of 10.00. Only specify the required columns. Write the SQL statement.
quizDraft.hint: Only required columns must be listed. The rest will use their defaults.

help.concept: If a column is NOT NULL and has no default, you must provide a value. Otherwise, defaults are used.
help.hint_1: List only name, category, and price in your INSERT.
help.hint_2: Omit status, is_test, notes, and last_updated; they will use defaults.

quizDraft.solutionCode: INSERT INTO inventory_items (name, category, price) VALUES ('Test Poster', 'Decor', 10.00);

quizDraft.title: Understanding default and NULL behavior
quizDraft.prompt: Which of the following statements about default values and NULLs in the inventory_items table are true? Select all that apply.
quizDraft.hint: Think about what happens when you omit a column or explicitly set it to NULL.

help.concept: Default values are used when a column is omitted from an INSERT. Explicit NULLs override defaults if the column allows NULL.
help.hint_1: If you omit a column with a default, the default is used. If you insert NULL, the value is NULL (if allowed).
help.hint_2: Consider which columns allow NULL and which have defaults.

options.a: If you omit the status column in an INSERT, it will be set to 'draft'.
options.b: If you insert NULL into the notes column, it will store NULL.
options.c: If you omit the price column, it will be set to 0.
options.d: If you omit the last_updated column, it will be set to '2026-02-01'.

quizDraft.title: Default value for is_test
quizDraft.prompt: What is the default value for the is_test column in the inventory_items table?
quizDraft.hint: Check the table definition for the is_test column.

help.concept: The default value for a column is set in the table schema using DEFAULT.
help.hint_1: Look for the DEFAULT keyword in the is_test column definition.
help.hint_2: The is_test column is used to mark test items and defaults to a certain integer.

quizDraft.template: The default value for is_test is ___.
